headline: ArcelorMittal and AWS Advance AI in Lower-Carbon Construction
summary: MT teams up with AWS to bring AI and cloud tools to steelmaking and supply lower-carbon steel under a multi-year deal.

headline: Nucor: No Longer An Easy Win
summary: Nucor is downgraded to Hold, as the risk/reward is less compelling after a 92% rally and peak earnings multiples. Read more on NUE stock here.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $258
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Carlos De Alba   maintains Nucor (NYSE:NUE) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $227 to $258.
